---
title: "Assignment 1"
author: "Meghan Duarte"
date: "2026-03-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```



```{r}
Data <- read.csv('BirthsAndFertilityRatesAnnual.csv')
Data
filtered_data <- Data %>% filter(DataSeries %in% c("Total Fertility Rate (TFR)","Total Live-Births"))
filtered_data

#rownames(filtered_data)[rownames(filtered_data) == "Total Fertility Rate (TFR)"] <- "TFR"

#filtered_data
#rownames(filtered_data) <- c("TFD", "TLB")
#filtered_data
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = filtered_data, aes(x = "DataSeries")) + 
  geom_boxplot()
```

```{r}
filtered_data |> autoplot("Total Fertility Rate (TFR)")

```
